ref: But Jesus replied: You want a sign because you are evil and won't believe! But the only sign you will get is the sign of the prophet Jonah.
text: Se Yesu he nɔ nɛ e de mɛ ke: “Yi nɔ bi yayahi kɛ gba puɛli ngɛ okadi hlae; se a be mɛ okadi ko hae, kaa ja gbalɔ Yona okadi ɔ.
translated: When Jesus saw that they were troubled, he said to them: “Take courage, it is I; do not be afraid. But if you are afraid, you will be like Jonah who was afraid.”

ref: You may be sure a servant who is always faithful will be put in charge of everything the master owns.
text: Niinɛ, i ngɛ nyɛ dee ke, e maa ngɔ lɛ ngɔ to e nihi tsuo kulaa nya.
translated: Today, if you are not careful, you will let something slip and it will cause you great sorrow.

ref: At noon the sky turned dark and stayed that way until three o'clock.
text: Se kɛ je piani ngmlɛ nyɔngma kɛ enyɔ kɛ ya su ngmlɛ etɛ ɔ, diblii wo ngɛ zugba a tsuo nɔ.
translated: If you plant a good seed and it grows well, the harvest will fill your barn.

ref: When Herod found out that the wise men from the east had tricked him, he was very angry. He gave orders for his men to kill all the boys who lived in or near Bethlehem and were two years old and younger. This was based on what he had learned from the wise men.
text: Jeha nɛ ɔ benɛ Herode na kaa ni leli ɔmɛ sisi lɛ ɔ, e muklii mi fu wawɛɛ, nɛ e tsɔ a ya gbe jokuɛ nyumuwi tsuo nɛ ngɛ Betlehem kɛ lejɛ ɔ ni ɔmɛ a mi tsuo, ninɛmɛ nɛ ye jeha enyɔ kɛ ninɛmɛ nɛ yi ja ngɛ be nɛ e bi ni leli ɔmɛ fitsofitso ɔ nya.
translated: The wise men went to Herod and told him that they had seen the star, and he asked them carefully, and they said they had come to worship the child who was born in Bethlehem, because the star had appeared to them in the east and they had come to worship him.

ref: But I tell you that Solomon with all his wealth wasn't as well clothed as one of them.
text: Se i ngɛ nyɛ dee ke: Salmo kɛ e nyami ɔ tsuo tete mia we kaa enɛ ɔmɛ a kpɛti kake.
translated: The meaning is this: A child who does not listen to an elder’s advice will later regret it.

ref: But Jesus replied: You want a sign because you are evil and won't believe! But the only sign you will get is the sign of the prophet Jonah.
text: Se Yesu he nɔ nɛ e de mɛ ke: “Yi nɔ bi yayahi kɛ gba puɛli ngɛ okadi hlae; se a be mɛ okadi ko hae, kaa ja gbalɔ Yona okadi ɔ.
translated: When Jesus saw that they were about to leave, he said: “You will not find a greater prophet than John; yet the one who is least in the kingdom of God is greater than John.”

ref: You may be sure a servant who is always faithful will be put in charge of everything the master owns.
text: Niinɛ, i ngɛ nyɛ dee ke, e maa ngɔ lɛ ngɔ to e nihi tsuo kulaa nya.
translated: Today, if it is not you, you will not see anyone else coming to help you.

ref: At noon the sky turned dark and stayed that way until three o'clock.
text: Se kɛ je piani ngmlɛ nyɔngma kɛ enyɔ kɛ ya su ngmlɛ etɛ ɔ, diblii wo ngɛ zugba a tsuo nɔ.
translated: If you plant a good seed and it grows well, you will reap its fruit in the future.

ref: Do something to show you have really given up your sins.
text: Ke nyɛ tsake nyɛ tsui ɔ lɛɛ nyɛɛ wo yiblii nɛ sa tsui tsakemi mɔ!
translated: If you are not a thief, then you are a witch, because no one steals from a witch!

ref: The girl hurried back and told Herod, “Here and now on a serving plate I want the head of John the Baptist!”
text: Nɛ amlɔ ɔ e ba matsɛ ɔ ngɔ oya nɛ e ba de lɛ ke: “I ngɛ hlae nɛ o ngɔ Yohane Baptisilɔ ɔ yi ngɔ ha mi amlɔ nɛ ɔ nɔuu ngɛ ka mi.”
translated: When they came to him, they said to him: “We have found that you are the one John the Baptist said would come after him.”

ref: The seeds that fell along the road are the people who hear the message. But Satan soon comes and snatches it away from them.
text: Be komɛ ɔ, munyu ɔ ya nɔɔ blɔ tue. Ni nɛ ɔmɛ nuɔ, se amlɔ nɔuu nɛ a nu ɔ, Satan baa ba saa munyu nɛ a du ngɛ a mi ɔ.
translated: When he came, he found the people living in darkness. He told them to repent, because if they did not, Satan would come and take their souls away.

ref: But while everyone was sleeping, an enemy came and scattered weed seeds in the field and then left.
text: Se benɛ ni ɔmɛ hwɔ si ɔ, e he nyɛlɔ ko ba ba du hu kɛ futu ngma a, nɛ e je.
translated: If someone sees something and it is not good for them to have, they should leave it alone.

ref: “The Emperor's,” they answered. Then Jesus told them, “Give the Emperor what belongs to him and give God what belongs to God.”
text: A de lɛ ke: “Kaisare nɔ ʼi.” Nɛ e de mɛ ke: “Lɛɛ, ynyɛɛ ngɔ Kaisare nihi ngɔ ha Kaisare, nɛ Mawu ni ɔmɛ nyɛ ngɔ ha Mawu!”
translated: He said to him: “Caesar’s is yours.” But he said to him: “No, give to Caesar what is Caesar’s, and to God what is God’s!”

ref: When Herod found out that the wise men from the east had tricked him, he was very angry. He gave orders for his men to kill all the boys who lived in or near Bethlehem and were two years old and younger. This was based on what he had learned from the wise men.

translated: The wise men went to Herod and told him that they had seen the star, and he asked them carefully, and they told him that a child had been born in Bethlehem, and that is why the star appeared, so Herod sent them to go and see the child who had been born.

ref: But I tell you that Solomon with all his wealth wasn't as well clothed as one of them.

translated: When Jesus saw the crowds, he said: “This place is like a vast field ready for harvest; but the workers are few, so ask the Lord of the harvest to send out workers.”

translated: If you want to eat fresh fish and you don't have money to buy it, you have to go to the riverside and cast a net.

ref: When Herod found out that the wise men from the east had tricked him, he was very angry. He gave orders for his men to kill all the boys who lived in or near Bethlehem and were two years old and younger. This was based on what he had learned from the wise men.

text: Se i ngɛ nyɛ dee ke: Salmo kɛ e nyami ɔ tsuo tete mia we kaa enɛ ɔmɛ a kpɛti kake.
translated: It is not good for a person to be alone: A person should have someone to share their thoughts with so that they can help each other.

ref: But Jesus replied: You want a sign because you are evil and won't believe! But the only sign you will get is the sign of the prophet Jonah.
text: Se Yesu he nɔ nɛ e de mɛ ke: “Yi nɔ bi yayahi kɛ gba puɛli ngɛ okadi hlae; se a be mɛ okadi ko hae, kaa ja gbalɔ Yona okadi ɔ.
translated: When Jesus saw the crowds, he said: “This place is like a vast harvest field, but the workers are few; therefore, ask the Lord of the harvest to send out workers into his harvest field.”

text: Niinɛ, i ngɛ nyɛ dee ke, e maa ngɔ lɛ ngɔ to e nihi tsuo kulaa nya.
translated: Today, I am not the one who will go to the farm because my leg is hurting badly.

ref: At noon the sky turned dark and stayed that way until three o'clock.

translated: If you want to eat a ripe mango and you don't know how to eat it, the seed will remain in your mouth.
